title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at FedEx India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at FedEx India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
